dashboard.title: Aloha Pool - Heat Pump Performance & COP Analysis

targets.query:
// Power in kW
power = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /actual_power_z04/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1000.0}))
  |> yield(name: "power_kw")

// Delta T
inlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /inlet_water_temp_t02/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()

outlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /outlet_water_temp_t03/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()

// Heat output kW = 0.0698 × flow_Lmin × ΔT
heat_kw = join(
  left: inlet,
  right: outlet,
  on: ["_time"],
  as: (l, r) => ({
    _time: l._time,
    _value: 0.0698 * ${flow_rate} * (r._value - l._value)
  })
)
|> yield(name: "heat_kw")

// Energy consumed today (kWh)
energy = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /cumulative_power_consumption_z06/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 24h, fn: spread)
  |> yield(name: "elec_kwh")

// Heat delivered (approximate from avg delta T)
inlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /inlet_water_temp_t02/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")

outlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /outlet_water_temp_t03/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")

join(
  left: inlet,
  right: outlet,
  on: ["_time"],
  as: (l, r) => ({
    _time: l._time,
    _value: 0.0698 * ${flow_rate} * (r._value - l._value)
  })
)
|> integral(unit: 1h)
|> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0}))
|> yield(name: "heat_kwh")

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /cumulative_power_consumption_z06/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 7d, fn: spread)
  |> yield(name: "energy_7d")

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /actual_power_z04/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1000.0}))

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /cumulative_power_consumption_z06/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: spread)

inlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /inlet_water_temp_t02/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")

outlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /outlet_water_temp_t03/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")

join(
  left: inlet,
  right: outlet,
  on: ["_time"],
  as: (l, r) => ({
    _time: l._time,
    _value: 0.0698 * ${flow_rate} * (r._value - l._value)
  })
)
|> integral(unit: 1h)
|> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0}))

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /actual_power_z04/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1000.0}))
  |> yield(name: "power")

inlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /inlet_water_temp_t02/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

outlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /outlet_water_temp_t03/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

join(
  left: inlet,
  right: outlet,
  on: ["_time"],
  as: (l, r) => ({
    _time: l._time,
    _value: 0.0698 * ${flow_rate} * (r._value - l._value)
  })
)
|> yield(name: "heat")

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /ambient_temp_t05/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: ${interval}, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "ambient")

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /inlet_water_temp_t02/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "pool")

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /set_temp/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "setpoint")

pool = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /inlet_water_temp_t02/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()

ambient = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /ambient_temp_t05/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()

join(
  left: pool,
  right: ambient,
  on: ["_time"],
  as: (l, r) => ({
    _time: l._time,
    _value: l._value - r._value
  })
)

regular = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /cumulative_power_consumption_z06/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: spread)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * ${regular_tariff}}))
  |> yield(name: "regular_cost")

low = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /cumulative_power_consumption_low_z06_l/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: spread)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * ${low_tariff}}))
  |> yield(name: "low_cost")

inlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /inlet_water_temp_t02/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")

outlet = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /outlet_water_temp_t03/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")

join(
  left: inlet,
  right: outlet,
  on: ["_time"],
  as: (l, r) => ({
    _time: l._time,
    _value: r._value - l._value
  })
)
|> aggregateWindow(every: ${interval}, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /mode/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")

panels.title: Daily Energy: Input vs Output vs COP

targets.query:
from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /cumulative_power_consumption_z06/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: spread, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "elec")

runtime = from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /compressor_operational_time_z08/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: spread)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / 24.0) * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /compressor_operational_time_z08/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: spread)

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] =~ /aloha_sensory_aquatics/ and r["entity_id"] =~ /comp_output_frequency_o07/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
